Isa was born to Maryam by Allah's word, without a father, as a sign for mankind.
By Allah's permission he healed the blind and the leper, gave life to the dead, and made a bird from clay.
He called Bani Isra'il to worship Allah alone and gave glad tidings of a Messenger to come after him named Ahmad.
He was not crucified; Allah raised him to Himself, and he will return before the Day of Judgement.
